package rulefixtures

// scenario for interface_slice_allocation: `[]interface{}` or `[]any` used to pass homogeneous typed data
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule604PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario604Positive(records []Rule604PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
